calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melanie Claassen, via ZOOM, for Helena Russ, Petitioner.

Counsel begins by elaborating on the language in the decedent's will specifically, clarifying definitions regarding leaving the property entirely to the spouse.

The Petition for Spousal Property is submitted with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Quesada. Not reported.
